business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate/property holdings with office and mercantile locations.

coverages_discussed.notes: Schedule includes building, contents, and business income values across 8 Texas locations. Current total insured value is 314984000. Prior year total insured value shown is 229053199. Modifications note updated TIV per appraisal effective 2026-03-15.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Portfolio consists of 8 commercial property locations in Texas, including office and mercantile occupancies in Dallas, Houston, Plano, Fort Worth, and Southlake. Construction types include Fire Resistive, Masonry Non-Combustible, and Non-Combustible. All listed locations are sprinklered.

concerns: Material increase in total insured value from prior year schedule to current schedule.
Portfolio includes multiple high-value commercial properties, including high-rise office buildings.
Modification sheet notes addition of a new warehouse facility and deletion of an old location, but the new warehouse is not listed in the provided current location schedule.
positives: Majority of locations are Fire Resistive or Masonry Non-Combustible construction.
Current TIV updated per appraisal effective 2026-03-15.
